hooks._comment: Design-mode preamble gate. BLOCKS Write/Edit on frontend/{src,e2e/mockups}/*.tsx|html|ts when .lattice/design-mode.lock has preamble:pending. Uses git-rev-parse to resolve repo root; relative-path hook commands silently fail to fire on Windows (root-cause for VERIFY-DS-01). Cooperates with scripts/design-session.sh state machine. See commands/lattice/design.md Step 0.

hooks.command: bash -c 'LOCK_DIR=".lattice/commit.lock"; if [ -d "$LOCK_DIR" ]; then LOCK_META=""; if [ -f "$LOCK_DIR/meta" ]; then LOCK_META=$(cat "$LOCK_DIR/meta"); fi; LOCK_AGE=0; if [ -f "$LOCK_DIR/meta" ]; then LOCK_TIME=$(stat -c %Y "$LOCK_DIR/meta" 2>/dev/null || stat -f %m "$LOCK_DIR/meta" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); NOW=$(date +%s); LOCK_AGE=$((NOW - LOCK_TIME)); fi; if [ "$LOCK_AGE" -gt 300 ]; then echo "WARNING: Stale commit lock (${LOCK_AGE}s old). Forcing removal."; rm -rf "$LOCK_DIR"; else echo "BLOCKED: Another agent is committing. Lock held by:"; echo "$LOCK_META"; echo ""; echo "Wait for the lock to be released, or run: bash scripts/acquire-lock.sh your-topic --poll"; echo "Lock age: ${LOCK_AGE}s (auto-expires at 300s)"; exit 1; fi; fi'
hooks._comment: Commit lock. BLOCKS if another agent holds .lattice/commit.lock. Auto-expires stale locks >5min.

hooks.command: bash -c 'staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); changed=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null); all="$staged $changed"; HAS_RESEARCH=false; if echo "$all" | grep -qE "(research/[^/]+\.md|incoming/.*synthesis|peer-reviews/)"; then HAS_RESEARCH=true; fi; if [ "$HAS_RESEARCH" = true ]; then HAS_GAPS=false; if echo "$staged" | grep -qE "(REGISTRY\.md|TODO\.md)"; then HAS_GAPS=true; fi; if [ "$HAS_GAPS" = false ]; then echo "WARNING: Research/synthesis/review files changed but REGISTRY.md and TODO.md are not staged."; echo ""; echo "Did you persist discovered gaps? Every skill that discovers gaps must write them to:"; echo "  - docs/_internal/research/REGISTRY.md (research gaps)"; echo "  - docs/_internal/TODO.md (data/implementation gaps)"; echo ""; echo "If no gaps were found, this is OK -- proceed with the commit."; fi; fi'
hooks._comment: Gap persistence reminder. WARNS (non-blocking) when research/synthesis files changed but gap files not staged.

hooks.command: bash -c 'staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$staged" | grep -qE "(classification|findings_|derive-summaries|cross-domain-syndromes|syndrome-interpretation|findings-rail-engine|recovery-classification|finding-nature|protective-signal|lab-clinical-catalog)"; then if ! echo "$staged" | grep -qE "\.(test|spec)\."; then echo "PIPELINE MODULE CHANGED WITHOUT TESTS. Staged pipeline files:"; echo "$staged" | grep -E "(classification|findings_|derive-summaries|cross-domain-syndromes|syndrome-interpretation|findings-rail-engine|recovery-classification|finding-nature|protective-signal|lab-clinical-catalog)"; echo ""; echo "Commit checklist requires: write the failing test FIRST for these modules."; echo "Stage a test file, or use git commit with --no-verify if you have a reason."; exit 1; fi; fi'
hooks._comment: Pipeline test-first. BLOCKS if pipeline modules staged without test files.

hooks.command: bash -c 'MSG=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$MSG" | grep -qE "^(feat|fix):" 2>/dev/null; then if ! echo "$MSG" | grep -q "Topic:" 2>/dev/null; then echo "REMINDER: This looks like topic work (feat:/fix:) but has no Topic: trailer."; echo "Add to commit message body:"; echo "  Topic: <topic-name>"; echo "  Phase: <phase>  (optional: research-complete, blueprint-complete, complete)"; echo ""; echo "Without Topic:, the autopilot and coherence engine cannot track this work."; echo "If this is NOT topic work (framework, docs, CI), ignore this reminder."; fi; fi'
hooks._comment: Topic trailer reminder. WARNS (non-blocking) when feat/fix commits lack a Topic: trailer.

hooks.command: bash -c 'GATE=".lattice/review-gate.json"; if [ ! -f "$GATE" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: /lattice:review was not run."; echo ""; echo "Every commit requires a review gate. No exceptions."; echo "This is the #1 process failure -- agents skip the review, skip doc generators,"; echo "skip checklist items, and present work as done."; echo ""; echo "REQUIRED before committing:"; echo "  1. Run /lattice:review (writes the gate file when all checks pass)"; echo "  -- OR for trivial fixes (docs-only, typo, comment) --"; echo "  2. Run: bash scripts/write-review-gate.sh pass \"trivial fix\""; echo ""; echo "The review runs: build, tests, doc generators, MANIFEST update, TODO update,"; echo "spec archival, requirement trace, architect review, and decision audit."; echo "Skipping it means skipping ALL of those."; exit 1; fi; GATE_TIME=$(stat -c %Y "$GATE" 2>/dev/null || stat -f %m "$GATE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); NOW=$(date +%s); GATE_AGE=$((NOW - GATE_TIME)); if [ "$GATE_AGE" -gt 1800 ]; then echo "BLOCKED: Review gate is stale (${GATE_AGE}s old, max 1800s)."; echo "Re-run /lattice:review before committing."; exit 1; fi'
hooks._comment: Review gate enforcement. BLOCKS ALL commits without a fresh review gate file. No file-count threshold -- every commit goes through review.

hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "Co-Authored-By"; then echo "BLOCKED: CLAUDE.md: No co-author -- never add Claude as co-author."; exit 1; fi'
hooks._comment: Co-author block. BLOCKS writes containing Co-Authored-By.

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+' 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then bash C:/pg/pcc/scripts/complexity-check.sh "$FILE" 2>&1 || true; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+' 2>/dev/null || true); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "(classification\.py|findings_pipeline\.py|statistics\.py|view_dataframes\.py|domain_stats\.py|scores_and_rules\.py|findings-rail-engine\.ts|derive-summaries\.ts|cross-domain-syndromes\.ts|endpoint-confidence\.ts|finding-nature\.ts|organ-weight-normalization\.ts|syndrome-interpretation\.ts|g-lower\.ts)"; then echo "ENGINE FILE MODIFIED: $(basename $FILE)"; echo "Run /regen-validation after this change set to verify signal detection scores."; fi'
hooks._comment: Engine change detection. Advisory -- flags validation ratchet needed.

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+' 2>/dev/null || true); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "frontend/src/.*\.tsx?$"; then cd C:/pg/pcc/frontend && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -20; fi'
hooks._comment: TS/TSX build check. Advisory -- runs npm run build after .ts/.tsx edits under frontend/src/ to catch TypeScript errors early.

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path"\s*:\s*"\K[^"]+' 2>/dev/null || true); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "backend/.*\.py$"; then C:/pg/pcc/backend/venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import py_compile; py_compile.compile(r'"'"'"$FILE"'"'"', doraise=True)" 2>&1 | tail -10; fi'
hooks._comment: Python syntax check. Advisory -- catches syntax errors in backend .py files immediately after edit.
